## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn test` passes
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes
- [ ] `yarn docs:api` passes (no `docs/api` / `docs/api-inventory.md` drift)
- [ ] `yarn docs:verify` passes (all doc snippets type-check)
- [ ] `yarn docs:llms` produces no drift
- [ ] `yarn examples:typecheck` passes
- [ ] `yarn pack --dry-run` is clean
- [ ] New public exports have TSDoc + an `@example`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` (if user-facing)
